name: Revenue Leakage Identification
trigger: Passive probe CDR correlation identifies 3% of data sessions with no corresponding billing record over 30-day audit window.

autonomyLevels.L1: Revenue assurance team reviews exception report. Manual reconciliation with BSS.
autonomyLevels.L2: Automated flagging of unbilled sessions. Reconciliation queue created.
autonomyLevels.L3: Real-time leakage detection with automated BSS correction trigger.
autonomyLevels.L4: Continuous revenue integrity monitoring. Leakage corrected before monthly close.

economicOutcome: Unbilled data sessions identified and recovered. Systematic billing gap closed.
economicCalculation: 3% leakage on €10M monthly data revenue = €300K/month unrecovered. Annual: €3.6M. Passive probe cost: fraction of leakage recovered in first quarter.
combinationUpgrade: Combine with Emblasoft Evolver (active probe) to confirm that service was actually delivered before raising billing correction — avoiding false recovery on genuinely failed sessions.
